attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS  POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,BP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS ATTRIBUTED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT
,CASE WHEN (MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' OR MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) BETWEEN '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND '1950-01-01 00:00:00')
THEN MAX(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT) ELSE MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) END AS COVERAGE_SD
,CASE WHEN (MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' OR MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM)  BETWEEN '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND '1950-01-01 00:00:00')
 THEN MAX(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT) ELSE MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) END AS COVERAGE_ED
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS END_CUSTOMER
,MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID AS END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,BP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,BP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS ORDERED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ORDER_PRODUCT_CD
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.service_flg 
,CASE WHEN  (MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' OR MAX(POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' ) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS VALID_COVERAGE
,'N' AS TRY_AND_BUY_FLG
,MIN(POS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE) AS CISCO_BOOKED_DTM  
,CASE WHEN COALESCE( PNVR.SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM , POS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER )='UNKNOWN' THEN NULL ELSE 
    COALESCE( PNVR.SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM , POS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER ) END AS DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER
,BP.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD AS ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD
,POS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
,MCPH.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY    
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NULL AS SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY 
,NULL AS LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY  
,SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BV_BKGS_MEASURE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.CALENDAR_DATE  
INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,'UNKNOWN' AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER  FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE BKG GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
UNION
SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) POS
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP
ON (BP.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP1
ON (BP1.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_PRODUCT_KEY)
LEFT JOIN ( SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_TV 
WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1,2 ) PNVR
ON POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = PNVR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN (SELECT B.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,A.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID,A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CXCUST_BU_PARTY_MAPPING A,
$$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE B
WHERE A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=B.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) MCPH
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=MCPH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHERE BV_BKGS_MEASURE.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG IN ( 'Y' )
AND BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS' )
AND BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 4
AND  BP1.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD IN ('Term')
AND BP1.PRDT_SETUP_CLASSIFICATION_CD IN ('Software')
AND BP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME in (SELECT ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR GROUP BY 1)
AND MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID
in (SELECT END_CUSTOMER_HQ FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR GROUP BY 1)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,7,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,16,18,19,20,21,22  HAVING SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)<>0

SELECT
BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    AS ORDER_NUMBER
,BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS  ORDER_LINE_ID
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,BP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS ATTRIBUTED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT
,COALESCE(MAX(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM),max(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT)) AS COVERAGE_SD
,COALESCE(MAX(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM),max(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT)) AS COVERAGE_ED
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER
,MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID AS END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,BP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,BP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS ORDERED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ORDER_PRODUCT_CD
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.service_flg 
,CASE WHEN  (MAX(BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) IS NULL OR MAX(BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) IS NULL ) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS VALID_COVERAGE
,CASE WHEN BV_SALES_ORDER.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME='Try and Buy' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRY_AND_BUY_FLG
,MIN(CAST(BV_SALES_ORDER.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME AS DATE)) AS CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,CASE WHEN BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER='UNKNOWN' THEN NULL ELSE BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER END AS  DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER
,BP.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD
,BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,MCPH.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY       
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NULL AS SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY 
,NULL AS LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY 
,SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BV_BKGS_MEASURE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER BV_SALES_ORDER
ON BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=BV_SALES_ORDER.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.CALENDAR_DATE  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP
ON (BP.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP1
ON (BP1.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
AND  BP1.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD IN ('Term')
AND BP1.PRDT_SETUP_CLASSIFICATION_CD IN ('Software')
AND BP1.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME <> 'UNKNOWN')
/*INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MCPH
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=MCPH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY */
INNER JOIN (SELECT B.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,A.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID,A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CXCUST_BU_PARTY_MAPPING A,
$$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE B
WHERE A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=B.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) MCPH
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=MCPH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHERE BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP' )
AND BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 4
AND BP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME in (select ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR GROUP BY 1)
AND MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID
in (SELECT END_CUSTOMER_HQ FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR GROUP BY 1)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,15,17,19,20,21,22,23,24,25  HAVING SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)<>0

SELECT
 CAST(TO_NUMBER(XB.WEB_ORDER_ID) AS BIGINT) AS ORDER_NUMBER
,BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS  ORDER_LINE_ID
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,BP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS ATTRIBUTED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT
,COALESCE(Max(S.term_start_dt ),max(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT))  AS COVERAGE_SD
,COALESCE(Max(S.term_end_dt ),max(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT))  AS COVERAGE_ED
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER
,COALESCE(MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_HQ
,BP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,COALESCE(XOA.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,BP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) AS ORDERED_INV_ITEM_ID
,BP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS  ORDER_PRODUCT_CD
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.service_flg 
,CASE WHEN  (MAX(S.term_start_dt) IS NULL OR MAX(S.term_end_dt) IS NULL ) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS VALID_COVERAGE
,CASE WHEN BV_SALES_ORDER.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME='Try and Buy' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TRY_AND_BUY_FLG
,MIN(XB.BOOKED_DTM) AS CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
,CASE WHEN BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER='UNKNOWN' THEN NULL ELSE  BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
END  AS  DV_CONTRACT_NUMBER
,BP.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,MCPH.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
,BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,BP.ITEM_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY 
,NULL AS LICENSE_PRODUCT_KEY 
,SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BV_BKGS_MEASURE
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER BV_SALES_ORDER
ON BV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=BV_SALES_ORDER.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.CALENDAR_DATE  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP
ON (BP.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT BP1
ON (BP1.ITEM_KEY = BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_PRODUCT_KEY)
INNER JOIN (SELECT B.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,A.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID,A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CXCUST_BU_PARTY_MAPPING A,
$$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE B
WHERE A.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=B.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) MCPH
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=MCPH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,PRDT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT ATTR, $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRDT WHERE 
ATTR.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY=PRDT.ITEM_KEY AND BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) XOA
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY
AND COALESCE(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)=XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN (SELECT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,WEB_ORDER_ID,BOOKED_DTM
 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT GROUP BY 1,2,3 )XB
ON BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SRC_RPTD_SBSCRPTN_CD,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,TERM_START_DT,TERM_END_DT
FROM $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_TV hdrt
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT trx
ON trx.dv_linked_mjr_ln_ref_num_key=hdrt.mjr_ln_exaas_sbscrn_so_ln_key
AND trx.SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID=hdrt.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ORDER BY END_TV_DT DESC)=1) S
ON S.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=XB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
WHERE BV_BKGS_MEASURE.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')
AND BV_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 4
AND MCPH.CX_CUSTOMER_BU_ID IN (SELECT END_CUSTOMER_HQ FROM $$STGDB.WI_SW_EL_POS_TRANS_INCR GROUP BY 1)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,15,17,19,20,21,22,23,24,25
HAVING SUM(BV_BKGS_MEASURE.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)<>0
